column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a half-folded fan to her lips" | TEXT="お言葉ですが" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding with a knowing, mysterious smile" | TEXT="存じております" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing slightly with a decorative hair-pin" | TEXT="こちらが正解かと" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking firm while sitting in seiza" | TEXT="私の考えはこうです" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Touching her collar with a determined hand" | TEXT="譲れぬ一線がございます" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Closing her eyes and shaking her head once" | TEXT="それは致しかねます" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Standing tall with a dignified gaze" | TEXT="覚悟はできております" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Writing a single kanji on a paper strongly" | TEXT="これが私の本意" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Watching with a sharp, intelligent look" | TEXT="お見通しでございます"
